onboarding.slide1Subtitle: Kụọ Kaadị Gị N'elu Ọ Bụla Terminal nke RuralPay wee mechaa ịkwụ ụgwọ n'ime sekọnd abụọ — ọ dịghị mkpa intanet.
onboarding.slide2Subtitle: Bufee ego na ọ bụla akaụntụ ụlọ akụ ma ọ bụ wallet na Naịjirịa ozugbo. Tinye nọmba akaụntụ ma ọ bụ gụọ QR code.
onboarding.slide3Subtitle: A na-echekwa azụmahịa ọ bụla site na nkwenye biometric na ezigbo nchekwa. Ego gị, nchekwa mgbe niile.
onboarding.slide4Subtitle: Ghọta ebe ego gị na-aga site na nhazi akpaaka, nchịkọta ọnwa, na ebumnuche nchekwa.

linkBankAccount.verificationSubtitle: Iji jiṣọ akaụntụ ụlọ akụ gị n'ụzọ nchekwa, anyị chọọ iji kwenye na ị nwe akaụntụ ahụ.
linkBankAccount.step2: Nke a na-ekwenye na ị nwe akaụntụ ahụ
linkBankAccount.feeNote: Ịkwụ ụgwọ otu oge • Nchekwa • Ozugbo
